options.name: from
options.description: input format

options.name: to
options.description: output format

options.name: output
options.description: output file (use - for stdout)

options.name: data-dir
options.description: user data directory

options.name: defaults
options.description: specify a set of default option settings

options.name: metadata
options.description: set document metadata field

options.name: standalone
options.description: produce output with an appropriate header and footer

options.name: template
options.description: use the specified file as a custom template

options.name: variable
options.description: set a template variable

options.name: toc
options.description: include an automatically generated table of contents

options.name: toc-depth
options.description: number of section levels to include in the TOC

options.name: number-sections
options.description: number section headings

options.name: highlight-style
options.description: specify coloring style for highlighted source code

options.name: pdf-engine
options.description: use the specified engine when producing PDF output

options.name: resource-path
options.description: search path for images and other resources

options.name: css
options.description: link to a CSS style sheet (may be used repeatedly)

options.name: self-contained
options.description: produce a standalone HTML file with no external deps

options.name: embed-resources
options.description: produce a standalone file with all resources embedded

options.name: include-in-header
options.description: include contents of FILE at the end of the header

options.name: mathml
options.description: convert TeX math to MathML

options.name: mathjax
options.description: use MathJax to display embedded TeX math in HTML

options.name: wrap
options.description: how to wrap text in the output

options.name: columns
options.description: length of lines in characters

options.name: fail-if-warnings
options.description: exit with error status if there are any warnings

options.name: verbose
options.description: give verbose debugging output

options.name: quiet
options.description: suppress warning messages

options.name: version
options.description: print version

options.name: help
options.description: show this help message
